completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only feature packet for resource and filesystem hardening. No implementation edits performed.

Expanded design.md with concrete SST schema, compose substitution plan, ML model envelope validation, and read-only-root allowlist. Coordinated with spec 042 (tailnet-edge) and spec 051 (secret-auth).
Expanded scopes.md with concrete DoD items, test IDs, and adversarial test plan.

Spec-review pass before implementation: spec.md, design.md, scopes.md confirmed coherent, scenarios SCN-045-A01 through SCN-045-A04 mapped to DoD items + Test Plan rows, no superseded or stale active artifacts found.

Scope 1: SST schema (deploy_resources + services.ml.model_memory_profiles), generator extraction, compose substitution, Go config parsing + validateMLModelEnvelope(). Scope 2: read_only + tmpfs allowlist on smackerel-core/smackerel-ml/ollama in deploy/compose.deploy.yml + docker-compose.yml; HF_HOME + SENTENCE_TRANSFORMERS_HOME relocated under /tmp.

Authored validate_ml_envelope_test.go (5 unit tests), compose_resource_contract_test.go (1 live-file + 4 adversarial), compose_filesystem_contract_test.go (2 live-file + 4 adversarial). All 16 spec-045 tests PASS.

Adversarial sub-tests act as persistent regression probes: dropping cpus/memory limit, hardcoding a literal, introducing default-fallback substitution, dropping read_only on a hardened service, setting read_only on an exempt service, or adding an unauthorized tmpfs all FAIL the live-file contract.
Live-stack smoke: ./smackerel.sh up brought up the dev stack under hardened compose; all containers Healthy; curl /api/health returned 200 on CORE_HOST_PORT=40001.

All 22 internal/deploy tests PASS (existing 11 + spec 045's 11). All 5 internal/config validate_ml_envelope tests PASS. Full ./smackerel.sh test unit --go suite green. No fabricated evidence — every DoD item linked to test name + report.md section.

Adversarial coverage acts as chaos: 8 mutated-fixture sub-tests prove the contract suite would FAIL if a future change reintroduced a missing limit, hardcoded literal, default fallback, missing read_only, postgres read_only, NATS read_only, or unauthorized tmpfs. The live-stack smoke under read-only roots stress-tests the cache relocation under real ML startup.

No simplification opportunities surfaced: contract tests use a single shared assertResourceContract / assertFilesystemContract helper, allowlists are declared as data not duplicated logic, generator uses existing required_value / required_json_value primitives.

Live-stack smoke confirms stability under hardening: postgres, nats, smackerel-core, smackerel-ml all reach Healthy state; no restart loops; ML container HF/sentence-transformers caches function correctly under /tmp/hf-cache and /tmp/st-cache.

Read-only-root + tmpfs allowlist + nosuid/nodev/noexec on /tmp where applicable raises the security floor. Postgres/nats exemption is intentional and documented in design.md table. Resource limits prevent resource exhaustion DoS. ML model envelope validation prevents misconfigured large models from OOM-killing the container at runtime.

report.md fully populated with Summary, Completion Statement, Code Diff Evidence, Scope 1 Evidence (8 sections), Scope 2 Evidence (6 sections), Validation Evidence, Audit Evidence, Chaos Evidence, Test Evidence Summary table. scopes.md fully populated with DoD items checked, evidence references, regression-E2E rows, and Evidence Index. design.md, spec.md unchanged from planning round.

completedScopes: Scope 1: Resource and ML model envelope contract

scopeProgress.scope: Scope 1: Resource and ML model envelope contract

lockdownState.rationale: Workflow ran in standard full-delivery mode; no lockdown round was required.
